method: 5 parallel read-only agents + personal file:line re-verification + history dedup

items.title: remove_provider_key non-atomic keyring rewrite loses keys on mid-loop failure
items.fix: write survivors to fresh slots first, delete old slots only after all kr_set succeed

items.title: read_config_at swallows corrupt config.json -> silent settings reset, next write overwrites
items.fix: distinguish missing file (Ok None) from present-but-corrupt (Err): on corrupt, do not overwrite, surface error

items.title: read_myproviders_raw swallows corrupt JSON -> empty list -> next save wipes all providers
items.fix: same as R2: detect corrupt vs absent, refuse to overwrite a corrupt file

items.title: SettingsTab saves (root/timeouts/startHidden/closeToTray) without try/catch -> silent failure
items.fix: wrap in try/catch + error toast, mirror applyToggleHotkey

items.title: Profile delete is the weakest confirm gate (no danger/requireText) despite deleting real data
items.fix: mark danger:true or requireText, matching reinstall/clean-conflicts

items.title: Bulk plugin disable not confirmed while single disable is (inverted)
items.fix: make confirm policy consistent (likely: drop the single-disable confirm, disable is reversible)

items.title: add_provider_key writes keyring slot before JSON -> orphan slot on JSON failure
items.fix: write JSON first or roll back the slot on JSON error

items.title: Cannot edit a created task's time -> delete+recreate
items.fix: add an edit-time action reusing run_schedule's time param

items.title: MCP servers cannot be added/edited/removed in UI, only deployed
items.fix: CRUD over .mcp.json with confirm + backup

items.title: MCP extras section shows drift with no action to fix it
items.fix: add remove/sync button per extra server

items.title: Provider preset lists only anthropic engines, not MyProvider registry -> re-typing
items.fix: include MyProvider entries in the preset dropdown

items.title: Profiles<->Providers redirect loop; the Providers section only points back
items.fix: open provider editor on Profiles directly, or give the section real content

items.title: No per-snapshot delete in UI, only bulk retention
items.fix: add a delete-snapshot action

items.title: Dead prop onProviderClear: declared + passed, never called inside
items.fix: remove the prop and its two pass-sites in +page.svelte (1623,1648)
items.blast_radius: no callers inside ProvidersTab; reset lives in ProfilesTab.menuResetProvider; safe to remove

items.title: MCP deploy confirm inconsistent (single/set silent, all confirmed; chip/bulk silent)
items.fix: consistent confirm policy for profile-config overwrites

items.title: Load models silently shows nothing on error/empty
items.fix: show 'no models found' / error message

items.title: Apply greys out on bad URL with no inline message
items.fix: inline validation hint for the URL field

items.title: No hint for invalid name / direct-without-profile -> button just greys
items.fix: inline hints for name + missing-profile cases

items.title: Forks ff (non-destructive) confirmed with the same dialog as delete
items.fix: skip confirm for ff / make it a lighter inline confirm

items.title: Raw numeric exit code shown to user
items.fix: humanize the failure message

items.title: Settings search has no empty state
items.fix: render a 'nothing found' state at zero matches

items.title: Check buttons (stack/engine) not disabled during run; my-provider ones are
items.fix: consistent disabled state during busy

items.title: Refresh busy label only for some runs (out of sync with other tabs)
items.fix: show common.busy for all running states

items.title: Hardcoded English aria-label select all/row in shared DataTable
items.fix: route through t() (affects all tables)

items.title: Hardcoded English aria-label close
items.fix: t('common.close')

items.title: Sync Apply confirms even the safe (additive) direction
items.fix: confirm only when disabling sync items

items.title: Hardcoded profile-name fallback flashes wrong names pre-resolve
items.fix: render a skeleton/empty until read_mcp resolves

items.title: read_skill_matrix recomputes skill_sets (full 4-dir walk) - double work on Environments
items.fix: memoize skill_sets / pass read_environments result to the matrix

items.title: load_installed_plugins/plugin_bundled_skills not memoized, hit disk in 4+ callers
items.fix: memoize with invalidation on plugin/skill change

items.title: read_environments re-runs read_providers+read_mcp (all profiles' settings), overlaps reload*
items.fix: share a per-request cache across these commands

items.title: DataTable re-filters/clones/sorts on every search keystroke, no debounce
items.fix: debounce the query (~150ms)

items.title: list_plugin_updates fires on every window focus (dozens of reads for a badge)
items.fix: throttle / only refresh on a longer interval or explicit action

items.title: selectedList O(selected x visible) via includes in filter
items.fix: use a Set for visibleKeys membership

items.title: ProvidersTab empty states use flat card vs the app's icon+title+hint pattern
items.fix: adopt the shared empty-state pattern

items.title: Inline ? help icon only on Analytics, not on equally complex tabs
items.fix: add the inline help affordance to Providers/Sync/Profiles, or drop it for consistency
